userText: I have access to common server but Nemo don't have.
correctedText: I have access to the shared server, but Nemo doesn't.

issues.note: 'Nemo don't have' → 'Nemo doesn't'; proper nouns and third-person singular subjects require 'doesn't', not 'don't'
issues.suggestion: He/she/it/[name] + doesn't — never 'don't' for singular subjects

issues.note: 'common server' → 'shared server'; 'common' can mean ordinary/frequent; for something used by multiple people, say 'shared'
issues.suggestion: shared server / shared drive / shared resource — use 'shared' for things multiple people use together
